01/03/2024, 09:00 - Messages and calls are end-to-end encrypted. No one outside of this chat, not even WhatsApp, can read or listen to them.
01/03/2024, 09:05 - Alice: Good morning everyone
01/03/2024, 09:06 - Bob: Morning! Quick question about the impeller

Should I check the raw water strainer first?
01/03/2024, 09:08 - Alice: Yes, check strainer then impeller
01/03/2024, 09:09 - Bob: <Media omitted>

01/03/2024, 09:10 - Alice: Looks like debris in there
